full_text:
Wang Lan (Xuantong) 王覽 (玄通)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Lan (王覽), styledXuantong (玄通), was born in Langye. Shielded his half brother from Lan’s own mother, encouraged Xiang to take office. Reached high rank. Wang Lan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Wang Lan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
